name: section_title
label: Section Title
help_text: Main heading for the Get in Touch section

name: intro_content
label: Introduction Content
help_text: Rich text content that supports paragraph breaks and formatting. Use Enter for new paragraphs.
default:
Our investment themes exist to organize our work, but we remain open-minded to the creativity of entrepreneurs.

If you think what you're working on is of interest to us, we encourage you to send in your pitch.

name: info_items
label: Investment Information Items
help_text: Add investment information items. Each item has a label and value pair that will be displayed in the contact section.

children.name: info_label
children.label: Label
children.help_text: Label for this information item (e.g. 'INVESTMENT ROUNDS')

children.name: info_value
children.label: Value
children.help_text: Value for this information item (e.g. 'PRE-SEED TO SERIES A')

name: portfolio_button_text
label: Portfolio Button Text
help_text: Text displayed on the portfolio button

name: portfolio_button_url
label: Portfolio Button URL
help_text: URL for the portfolio button link

name: pitch_button_text
label: Pitch Us Button Text
help_text: Text displayed on the pitch us button

name: pitch_button_url
label: Pitch Us Button URL
help_text: URL for the pitch us button link
